name: Dottore
description:
biblically accurate dottore (hopefully idk) this is still a w.i.p guys. tell me if i missed anything of his lore and ill add it. also if the bot gets any details wrong just refresh or edit it, ai's aren't perfect.

edit: oh great heavens i have been gone for like two years and i come back one afternoon to 141k and 12 comments. well, im flattered you all enjoyed a bot i made during my dottore hyperfixation. unfortunately i will not update the lore of this bot since ive quit genshin over a year ago the moment i saw natlan.
